Description: About the Role: Acme Corp is looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our platform team.  Responsibilities: Design and build Go microservices for our distributed platform serving millions of users.  Implement REST APIs and gRPC services with Kubernetes deployment on AWS EKS.  Collaborate with cross-functional teams in an Agile/Scrum environment.  Requirements: 4+ years of backend engineering experience.  Strong proficiency in Go or Golang.  Experience with Kafka, Docker, and microservice architectures.  Familiarity with PostgreSQL or other relational databases.  Experience with CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins or similar).  Nice to have: React frontend experience.  Spring Boot or Java background.

Team Introduction: The Globex backend team builds the core payment processing infrastructure used by thousands of merchants globally.  What You'll Do: Develop Java Spring Boot microservices for payment processing pipelines.  Integrate with Kafka for real-time event streaming and transaction processing.  Write and maintain PostgreSQL schemas and queries for high-throughput financial data.  Deploy services to AWS using Docker and Kubernetes.  Implement OAuth2 and OpenID Connect for secure API authentication.  Build and maintain Jenkins CI/CD pipelines.  About You: 2+ years of Java or Spring Boot development.  Experience with event-driven architectures and Kafka.  Knowledge of REST API design and microservices patterns.  Familiarity with container orchestration using Kubernetes.  Strong testing skills with JUnit and Mockito.

The Opportunity: Initech is hiring a Full Stack Engineer to work on our internal tooling and customer-facing web applications.  Responsibilities: Build React frontend components and Go backend services.  Design and implement REST APIs consumed by web and mobile clients.  Work with Docker to containerize applications and manage deployments.  Optimize PostgreSQL queries for performance and scalability.  Participate in code reviews and contribute to a culture of engineering excellence.  Requirements: Experience with React and modern JavaScript/TypeScript.  Proficiency in at least one backend language — Go, Java, or Python.  Understanding of RESTful API design and integration.  Comfortable working in a Linux/Bash environment.  Knowledge of Git and version control best practices.

About the Team: Umbrella Corp's infrastructure team is responsible for the reliability and scalability of our global platform processing over 100 million requests per day.  In This Role: Architect and implement distributed backend systems using Go and gRPC.  Build Kafka consumers and producers for high-throughput event-driven microservices.  Deploy and manage services on Kubernetes clusters across multiple AWS regions.  Implement observability tooling with distributed tracing (Zipkin), Prometheus monitoring, and structured logging.  Collaborate with a globally distributed team to deliver features across the full SDLC.  Required Skills: 5+ years backend engineering experience.  Expert-level Go or Golang skills.  Deep understanding of distributed systems and microservice architecture.  Experience with Kafka, gRPC, and protocol buffers.  Strong Kubernetes and Docker skills.  AWS experience preferred.

Job Summary: Stark Industries is seeking a Software Engineer to join our Platform Engineering team, which builds internal developer tools and shared infrastructure services.  Key Responsibilities: Develop and maintain Java Spring Boot services that power internal tooling used by hundreds of engineers.  Write integration and unit tests using JUnit and Mockito to maintain 80%+ code coverage.  Build and maintain Jenkins CI/CD pipelines for automated builds and deployments.  Contribute to Agile/Scrum ceremonies and help define technical requirements with product managers.  Maintain and improve PostgreSQL database schemas and stored procedures.  What We're Looking For: 2+ years of Java development experience.  Spring Boot and REST API knowledge.  Familiarity with Docker containers and Linux environments.  Comfortable with SQL and relational database concepts.  Strong written and verbal communication skills for cross-team collaboration.
